steps.title: Find the wind chill at 27°F and 20 mph
steps.content: Locate the row for air temperature 27°F and the column for wind chill temperature at wind speed 20 mph in the table. Their intersection gives 13°F.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $13$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $13$.
